creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Based on your description, may I propose the following patch to portmgr?

Well, sure you can propose it. Docs never hurt, alas, just maybe, this
could live better as a code block comment at the actual place where it's
done, instead in the top header.

I'll try not to forget to include this in next round of bpm commits.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

What do you mean? An African or a European swallow?
